business_ideas.idea: Canva for video: drag-and-drop video editing with templates for social
Facebook ad tech products to help advertisers save money or improve ads
Fidget toy or desk toy product (next silly putty for adults)
University-style apparel branded as Internet or YouTube instead of school
Mobility and flexibility fitness programs and products (Knees Over Toes model)
Location-based professional networking to find nearby business people
Niche job boards for specialized communities (Angular devs, PMs, etc)

predictions.text: Video editing tools will become as accessible as image design (Canva model)
Mobility and flexibility training will become mainstream fitness trend
